title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Caleb Writes Code analyzes Huawei's announced Tau Scaling Law as a competitive response in the US-China semiconductor race. The video discusses how EUV and DUV lithography, packaging, and logic folding are shaping advances toward smaller chip nodes, while examining implications of accelerating hardware competition.
